title: Software Update - DFU  - Onboarding in not displayed over DFU screens after connecting new device
scenario: Onboarding dialog is not displayed over DFU screens when a new device is connected during active firmware update
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home screen.
2. Initiate a Device Firmware Update (DFU) process on a currently connected device.
3. While the DFU process is active, connect a new device that supports onboarding (e.g., Emu, Tern, Osprey).
4. Observe the screen during the active DFU process.
5. Wait for the DFU process to complete.
expected: The onboarding dialog should be displayed immediately when the new device that supports onboarding is connected, even during an active DFU process.
